screens.name: projects/5670372511067729208/screens/249004127cb7408f87be9b25f1a43309
screens.prompt:
Title: Deniz Restaurant Reservation and Contact Section
Context: Mediterranean seafood restaurant website landing page.
Description of the screen: A sophisticated 'Bize Ulaşın' (Contact Us) and Reservation section for Deniz Restaurant. The layout is split into two columns on a light cream/sand background. The left column displays contact information in elegant white cards with soft shadows, featuring icons for Address (Çarşı, Belediye Meydanı No 4), Phone (+90 252 363 76 74), Hours (Her Gün 08:00 - 00:00), and a star icon for the 4.8/5 Google rating. The right column contains a professional 'Rezervasyon Yap' form with clean, labeled fields: Adınız Soyadınız, E-posta, Telefon, Tarih, Kişi Sayısı, and a Mesajınız textarea. The form features a prominent gold (#d4af37) 'Rezervasyon Gönder' button. A subtle success checkmark indicator is positioned near the button. The overall style uses deep ocean blue (#1a365d) for text and headers, maintaining the restaurant's elegant branding.
Platform: web
Form factor: desktop
screens.title: Deniz Restaurant Reservation and Contact Section

design.title: Deniz Restaurant Reservation and Contact Section

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the **Bize Ulaşın (Contact Us) and Reservation** section for Deniz Restaurant:

- **Deniz Restaurant Reservation and Contact Section**: This screen features a balanced two-column layout on a soft cream/sand background. The left side clearly displays essential contact info with modern icons and subtle cards, while the right side presents a professional, easy-to-use reservation form with a prominent gold submit button.

We have now designed the hero, the services/menu grid, and the contact/reservation section. Would you like to add a **Müşteri Yorumları (Customer Testimonials)** section or a **Galeri (Gallery)** to showcase the restaurant's views?

outputComponents.suggestion: Design a "Müşteri Yorumları" section with high-rated reviews
Create a "Galeri" section featuring the waterfront dining views
Add a footer with social media links and an embedded Google Map
